description_long: This is a decorative wrought iron guard rail featuring a series of vertical bars topped with ornate finials, each shaped like a spearhead. The rail is supported by two robust posts at either end, each capped with a larger, more elaborate finial. The horizontal rails are simple and straight, providing structural integrity and a classic, elegant appearance. The black metallic finish gives the guard rail a sleek, durable look suitable for urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or residential boundaries. The craftsmanship suggests a blend of both security and aesthetic appeal, with the pointed finials serving as a deterrent to climbing. The overall design is symmetrical and visually balanced, with consistent spacing between the vertical bars.
description: A black wrought iron guard rail with ornate spearhead finials and sturdy end posts, designed for both security and decorative appeal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the guard rail, with all vertical bars and decorative finials clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness and detailing of the end post, with the finial's profile visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the back of the vertical bars and the structure of the horizontal rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the other end post, displaying the finial's shape and the post's vertical grooves.
